backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management with CRUD operations, user profiles, trending analytics, similarity scoring, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that renames the 'clips' field to 'videoClips' when upgrading from old actor state to new actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color tokens using OKLCH color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'Beast Clipping'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and protected admin routes with detailed debug logging.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying total clips count and trending clips analytics table with loading states, error handling, and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single video clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading states, empty state messaging, and clip selection/deletion handlers.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips in a scrollable list, showing viral scores and allowing users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with timestamp inputs (start/end minutes/seconds), title field, and save functionality. Supports pre-filling from selected clips or suggestions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, Internet Identity authentication button, and conditional admin panel link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and an AI clip generation button that triggers auto-generation of clip suggestions for the loaded video.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores (0-100) with color-coded styling, icons (Flame/TrendingUp/Sparkles), and optional labels based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card component using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity login state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides auto-generation of clip suggestions with viral scores, currently using mock AI data but designed to integrate with real AI services in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook that handles creating new video clips with viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, then saves them via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook that manages clip start/end timestamps in minutes and seconds format, providing validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook providing utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application showing completed features, known issues with admin panel authentication switching from principal-based to user ID-based access control, and architectural notes.
